_meta.title: VVDI Mini happy-path burn trace (synthetic-but-pinned)
_meta.source: Bytes computed by calling buildPingRequest/buildDetectRequest/buildBurnRequest/buildVerifyRequest against the canonical inputs below. Re-derived in the contract test so a drift in any serializer fails this fixture immediately.
notes: Pins the exact wire-level request/response pairs the bridge emits during a happy-path PING -> DETECT -> BURN -> VERIFY exchange.
Chip = PCF7953 (uidBytes=4, payloadBytes=4 → 8 B id block — matches RFHUB KEY_ID_BLOCK_LEN).
BURN payload shape: ord(1)+uidLen(1)+payloadLen(1)+UID(4)+PAYLOAD(4)+SEC16(16) = 27 B; LEN = 1(CMD)+27 = 0x1C; full frame = hdr(2)+LEN(2)+CMD(1)+27+CK(1) = 33 B.
Once a real VVDI Mini capture is recorded, drop the bytes in place and flip _meta.verified_against_hardware to true.
